{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20557_1
|class_id=20557
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=collection@20557_2
|fame=14
|art=15
|fth=16
|civ=31
|tech=14
|ss1=Per 3 Incense used, Snail RUSH +1<br>Incense Used: 150/150
|ss2=Per 3 Incense used, Snail RUSH +2<br>Incense Used: 150/150
|ss3=Per 3 Incense used, Snail RUSH +3<br>Incense Used: 150/150
|ss4=Per 3 Incense used, Snail RUSH +3<br>Incense Used: 150/150
|ss7=Per 3 Incense used, Snail RUSH +3<br>Incense Used: 150/150<br> (Awakened)
}}
